description: Style NoteThe English brand gets it right with these understated denims. This pair of french connection jeans add a distinct personality to your off-duty staples. Get the casual yet dressy look just right with this pair. Wear this with that edgy button-up cardi, over a pastel shirt and a slim tie (with tonal desert boots). A monochrome or a printed tee is the right choice for a pared down look.Product DetailsBlue jeans with a washed and distressed look, features paint-drops styling, has a button and zipper closure in the front, two insert pockets at the right front and one at the left, two patch pockets at the back, loops at the waistband and contrast stitch detail above the hem. Has one loop below the waist band at the back to wear a low-slung bet.Material and care100% cottonWash as cottonWash and dry inside outSize and Fitfcuk Lean FitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
